text: Been on Orladeyo for 6 months. Attacks dropped from 3 per month to maybe 1 every two months. Daily pill is way easier than injections.
Insurance denied my Orladeyo refill AGAIN. Third prior auth this year. The process is exhausting.
Day in my life with HAE: take my daily pill head to work. Prophylaxis changed everything.
Travel tips for HAE warriors: always pack extra meds and keep your emergency plan accessible.
Diagnosed at 32 after years of random swelling. Doctors kept saying allergies. Genetic testing gave answers.
Dr. explains how oral kallikrein inhibitors prevent HAE attacks and reviews long-term data.
Stomach issues from Orladeyo are rough. Nausea every morning for 2 months. Doctor says give it time.
BioCryst announces expanded pediatric indication for ORLADEYO in patients ages 2-12.
Showing my HAE emergency kit. Medication check. Insurance card check. Always prepared.
My daughter was just diagnosed. She is 8. Terrified about what this means for her future.
Self-care Sunday with HAE: gentle exercise trigger tracking and appreciating attack-free days.
Copay is insane even with insurance. Empower Patient Services helped but the stress was unbearable.
Rare Disease Day: 15 years with HAE and still fighting for awareness and treatment access.
Explaining HAE in 60 seconds: rare genetic condition causing unpredictable painful swelling.
Patient panel at AAAAI discussing real-world experiences with HAE prophylactic treatments.
Brain fog since starting berotralstat. Doctor says not commonly reported but it feels real.
Happy Rare Disease Day! Sharing stories from the HAE community because visibility matters.
CSL Behring launches ANDEMBRY for HAE joining competitive landscape alongside ORLADEYO.
This community saved me. For years I felt alone. Finding other HAE patients changed everything.
Anxiety about when the next attack will hit never goes away. The mental toll is real.
POV: explaining to boss why you called in sick because your face swelled up overnight.
Empower Patient Services helped me navigate my insurance appeal. Got coverage after 3 months.
New data shows berotralstat reduces healthcare utilization in adolescent HAE patients.
Three years attack-free on Orladeyo. There IS hope for newly diagnosed patients.
It took 8 years and 12 doctors to diagnose my HAE. Diagnostic journey needs to improve.
My 3 year old diagnosed with NS. Skin care takes 2 hours each morning. Any parent tips?
Bath time is the hardest. My daughter screams because everything stings her fragile skin.
Living with Netherton means explaining my skin to strangers daily. The stares never get easier.
Anyone else spend hours on skin care? I use 8 different creams daily.
BioCryst begins Phase 1 of BCX17725 a KLK5 inhibitor for Netherton syndrome.
Prof Mellerio discusses NS pathophysiology and how SPINK5 mutations cause barrier dysfunction.
Watching your child suffer with no approved treatment is indescribable. Fund rare disease research.
Twin sisters sharing our Netherton skin care routine. Supporting each other through flares.
My son missed 40 school days from flares. Teachers dont understand this isnt just eczema.
Quoin Netherton Now campaign reaches 2M video views highlighting unmet need in NS.
Seven doctors over 4 years before genetic testing confirmed SPINK5 mutation. Finally answers.
Anyone in the BCX17725 trial? Daughter is 8 and weve tried everything. Desperate for options.
Rare Disease Day: NS affects 1 in 100000 people with ZERO approved treatments.
ISG conference was first time my daughter met another child with Netherton. Happy tears.
NS treatment market expected to grow with BCX17725 QRX003 and ATR-12 in pipeline.
Morning routine with Netherton: 45 min of skin care. Creams bandages gentle handling.
Grocery bill for special creams is crushing us. Insurance covers almost nothing.
Mandy from ISG shares her NS journey and advocates for genetic skin disease awareness.
People stare at my daughter everywhere. She is starting to notice. More awareness needed.
Just learned about BCX17725 trial. First real hope for treatment in years.
Starting Orladeyo next week. Nervous about side effects. Would love positive experiences.
AAAAI 2026 highlights new HAE treatment data and pediatric guidelines.
Baby in NICU 3 weeks due to NS skin infections. Infant mortality risk is terrifying.
Pharvaris deucrictibant positive Phase 3 adds another oral competitor in HAE prophylaxis.
Grateful for 20 years of community. When diagnosed I felt alone. Now we have each other.
